allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Sort-Object -Property WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 Name, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---"; $os=Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; "committed_GB: {0:N1} / limit_GB: {1:N1}" -f \(\($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize-$os.FreePhysicalMemory\)/1MB\), \($os.TotalVirtualMemorySize/1MB\))

PowerShell($env:HF_HUB_DISABLE_SYMLINKS_WARNING="1"; & C:\\works\\myAgent\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -u C:\\works\\myAgent\\gemma4.py --max-new-tokens 120 "RAM 절약에 대한 짧은 농담 하나만."; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
